fields.name: SHRI RAMAKRISHNA VIVEKANANDA JNANA VIKASA SHIKSHANA SAMSTE
fields.address:
C/O SHRI SHARADAMATA PUBLIC SCHOOL
AT/POST – TADAKOD
BETAGERI ROAD
TQ/DIST – DHARWAD
PIN CODE – 581105
KARNATAKA, INDIA
fields.about:
SHRI RAMKRISHAN VIVEKANAND JNANA VIKAS SHIKSHAN SAMSTHE is a social and educational organization committed to the holistic development of children, students, and the community. Inspired by the ideals of Swami Vivekananda, the organization works towards education, cultural enrichment, health awareness, and environmental responsibility.

The NGO focuses on nurturing moral values, discipline, social responsibility, and lifelong learning while addressing educational, health, and environmental needs of society.
fields.vision: To build an enlightened, healthy, and value-based society by empowering children and youth through education, culture, health awareness, and environmental responsibility.
fields.mission:
Pre-Primary Education
To provide a safe, joyful, and value-oriented learning environment for early childhood development.
To encourage curiosity, creativity, moral values, and basic life skills in young children.

Cultural Development of Children
To promote awareness of Indian culture, traditions, ethics, and social values among children.
To encourage creativity through music, dance, art, storytelling, celebration of festivals, and cultural activities.

Learning Hub
To support students with academic guidance, life skills, and continuous learning opportunities.
To promote inclusive education and lifelong learning for children and youth.

Competitive Examination Preparation for Students and Youth
To provide guidance and training for various competitive examinations.
To develop competence in general knowledge, logical reasoning, mathematics, language skills, and time management.
To build self-confidence, discipline, goal orientation, and a habit of consistent practice among students and youth.

Health Camps
To organize regular health camps for children and the community.
To promote preventive healthcare, early diagnosis, and healthy living practices.

Health Awareness
To educate students and communities about hygiene, nutrition, mental well-being, and healthy lifestyles.
To build awareness on women’s health, child health, and overall community wellness.

Organic Plantation & Environmental Care
To encourage organic farming, tree plantation, and eco-friendly practices.
To instill love for nature and a sense of responsibility towards environmental conservation among children and society.
fields.objectives:
To inculcate moral values, discipline, and cultural awareness among children.
To provide quality education from the early childhood stage.
To equip students and youth with academic skills and competitive examination preparedness.
To improve community health through awareness programs and health camps.
To support and promote women’s and children’s health initiatives.
To create awareness about environmental protection and organic farming practices.
To foster social responsibility, leadership, and a spirit of service among students and youth.
To promote inclusive education with equal opportunities for all sections of society.

fields.legal_identity: Registered under the Karnataka Societies Act, 1960 (Act 17 of 1960). Registered on September 18, 2012 under the Karnataka Societies Act, 1960.
